evals.prompt: I just got promoted to staff engineer — log this.
evals.expected_output: A new wiki/accomplishments/2026-04-26-promoted-to-staff-engineer.md file. dimension: career inferred from 'promoted'. impact: significant defaulted (promotions are significant by default). The page seeds ## What from the user's description and leaves ## Why It Matters / ## Context / ## Evidence for enrichment. Changelog entry appended; user nudged about career-narrative-refresh given impact level.

evals.prompt: Log: completed AWS Solutions Architect Pro cert today, impact significant, evidence is the certificate URL https://aws.amazon.com/verification/...
evals.expected_output: wiki/accomplishments/2026-04-26-aws-solutions-architect-pro.md with dimension: learning, impact: significant, evidence: the URL. Tag includes both 'accomplishment' and 'learning'. ## What seeded; ## Evidence pre-filled with the URL.

evals.prompt: Note this accomplishment: ran my first half-marathon over the weekend.
evals.expected_output: wiki/accomplishments/{weekend-date}-first-half-marathon.md with dimension: health inferred. Asks user to confirm date if today doesn't match (the weekend may be 1-2 days back). impact defaults to meaningful but offers 'significant' since 'first' suggests a threshold crossing — surfaces the choice rather than silently defaulting.
